requested_output: Extract visible lead-sheet chord chart into structured review-ready JSON without musical inference.
notes: Single photographed page with handwritten chord symbols and rehearsal annotations.
Visible printed or handwritten labels include verse, chorus, interlude, Coda, Segno, Fade Out, and D.S. notation.
The page is rotated in the source photo and was normalized for review.
constraints: Do not invent unreadable or implied chart content.
Preserve uncertainty explicitly until review resolves it.
Keep handwritten spellings exactly as seen when chord quality is ambiguous.
